manufacturer portion of the code; the manufacturer supplies the rest. 

Position 1–5 are Numeric 
Position 6–9 are Alphanumeric 
Position 10–11 are Alphanumeric or blank 

The Food and Drug Administration (FDA) website has a searchable NDC Directory: 
https://www.fda.gov/Drugs/InformationOnDrugs/ucm142438.htm 

A small number of RX claims may contain string patterns containing CPT or HCPCS codes. These codes
